description_long: This is a tall, slender shampoo bottle with a gently tapered cylindrical body and a rounded shoulder leading up to a wide, flat collar. The bottle is capped with a prominent, cylindrical push-style cap that is slightly wider than the neck, giving it a modern and ergonomic appearance. The main body is a muted pinkish-mauve color, while the cap and collar are a lighter, peachy-pink shade. The front of the bottle features printed text, including the brand name 'Natura tododia' and product details, but no visible graphic illustrations or patterns. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of plastic personal care packaging. This bottle is designed to be easily gripped and dispensed, suitable for use in bathrooms or urban personal care settings.
description: A tall, slender pink shampoo bottle with a wide, rounded push cap and printed label text on the front. The design is modern, smooth, and ergonomic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the printed label text and the full shape of the bottle with its wide, rounded push cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bottle's slender profile and the smooth transition from body to cap, with no visible label text.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the continuous, unadorned surface of the bottle and the cap's full circular shape.
description_view_3: Back view highlighting the bottle's uniform cylindrical form and the cap, with no visible text or graphics.
